name: Morad
description: Morad El Khattouti El Horami, known professionally as Morad, is a Spanish rapper and songwriter from L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Barcelona. He gained prominence with his raw street-style lyrics and distinctive voice, becoming one of the most influential figures in the Spanish urban scene. Active since the late 2010s, his music blends drill, trap, and melodic rap, often reflecting life in his neighborhood and personal experiences.
